# Keyline

> Zero-knowledge secrets manager for small dev teams. Push a `.env` with one
> command; teammates pull it decrypted on their machines. The server only ever
> holds ciphertext, so a breach of Keyline is not a breach of you. Solo is
> free, Team is $19/month flat.

Keyline is CLI-first. Install with `curl -fsSL keyline.sh/install | sh` or
`npm i -g @keylinesh/cli`, then `keyline login`, `keyline link`, and
`keyline push`. The web dashboard at /app shows metadata only; secret values
never reach a browser. Encryption is client-side (AES-256-GCM, X25519 device
keys); the design is public and verifiable rather than asserted.

## Docs

- [Security posture](https://keyline.sh/security): what our servers hold, the
  crypto primitives, the publicly anchored audit log, and how to report a
  vulnerability
- [Encryption design](https://github.com/keylinesh/keyline/blob/main/docs/encryption-design.md):
  the full scheme with key hierarchy, threat model, and known trade-offs
- [Source repository](https://github.com/keylinesh/keyline): the code
  is public; read it, don't trust us
- [Audit anchors](https://gitlab.com/resim.boyadzhiev/keyline-anchors): daily
  public witness of every workspace's audit chain head (hashes only)

## Product

- [Landing page](https://keyline.sh/): what Keyline does, pricing, FAQ
- [Dashboard](https://keyline.sh/app): metadata-only web UI, signs in via the
  CLI (no passwords)
- [Install script](https://keyline.sh/install): POSIX shell installer for the
  CLI
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@keylinesh/cli): the CLI,
  published with SHA-256 checksums

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](https://keyline.sh/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://keyline.sh/privacy): we hold ciphertext, metadata,
  and little else
- [Data Processing Agreement](https://keyline.sh/dpa): GDPR Article 28 terms,
  applies automatically
- [Refund policy](https://keyline.sh/refunds): 14 days, no questions

## Optional

- [security.txt](https://keyline.sh/.well-known/security.txt): RFC 9116
  machine-readable disclosure contact
- [Sitemap](https://keyline.sh/sitemap.xml)
